title: melia azedarach subvar. albiflora
intro: Melia azedarach subvar. albiflora, also known as the white-flowering or Chinese white birch leaf mahonia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the family Meliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Its medicinal properties include antibacterial, antifungal, and antiviral activities, which are thought to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. In traditional herbal preparations, Melia azedarach subvar. albiflora is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are consumed orally or applied topically to treat various health issues.
